case_title: DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS VS. MCL STEEL, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-29-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
